2603.11992.title: Few-for-Many Personalized Federated Learning
2603.11992.paper_summary: Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) aims to train customized models for clients with highly heterogeneous data distributions while preserving data privacy. Existing approaches often rely on heuristics like clustering or model interpolation, which lack principled mechanisms for balancing heterogeneous client objectives. Serving $M$ clients with distinct data distributions is inherently a multi-objective optimization problem, where achieving optimal personalization ideally requires $M$ distinct models on the Pareto front. However, maintaining $M$ separate models poses significant scalability challenges in federated settings with hundreds or thousands of clients. To address this challenge, we reformulate PFL as a few-for-many optimization problem that maintains only $K$ shared server models ($K \ll M$) to collectively serve all $M$ clients. We prove that this framework achieves near-optimal personalization: the approximation error diminishes as $K$ increases and each client's model converges to each client's optimum as data grows. Building on this reformulation, we propose FedFew, a practical algorithm that jointly optimizes the $K$ server models through efficient gradient-based updates. Unlike clustering-based approaches that require manual client partitioning or interpolation-based methods that demand careful hyperparameter tuning, FedFew automatically discovers the optimal model diversity through its optimization process. Experiments across vision, NLP, and real-world medical imaging datasets demonstrate that FedFew, with just 3 models, consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/pgg3/FedFew.
2603.11992.paper_summary_zh: 個性化聯邦學習（PFL）旨在為具有高度異質數據分佈的客戶訓練定制模型，同時保護數據隱私。現有的方法通常依賴於類似聚類或模型插值的啟發式方法，這些方法缺乏平衡異質客戶目標的原則性機制。服務於 $M$ 位擁有不同數據分佈的客戶本質上是一個多目標優化問題，理想情況下，實現最佳個性化需要在Pareto前沿上擁有 $M$ 個不同的模型。然而，在擁有數百或數千名客戶的聯邦環境中，維護 $M$ 個獨立模型會帶來顯著的可擴展性挑戰。為了解決這一挑戰，我們將PFL重新表述為一個少為多的優化問題，僅維護 $K$ 個共享伺服器模型（$K \ll M$），以共同服務所有 $M$ 位客戶。我們證明這一框架實現了近似最佳的個性化：隨著 $K$ 的增加，近似誤差減少，並且隨著數據增長，每個客戶的模型收斂到每個客戶的最優解。在這一重新表述的基礎上，我們提出了FedFew，一種通過高效的基於梯度的更新共同優化 $K$ 個伺服器模型的實用算法。與需要手動客戶劃分的基於聚類的方法或需要仔細調整超參數的插值方法不同，FedFew通過其優化過程自動發現最佳的模型多樣性。跨越視覺、自然語言處理和現實世界醫學影像數據集的實驗表明，FedFew僅用3個模型就能持續超越其他最先進的方法。代碼可在 https://github.com/pgg3/FedFew 獲得。
2603.11992.author: Ping Guo et.al.
2603.11992.authors: Ping Guo, Tiantian Zhang, Xi Lin, Xiang Li, Zhi-Ri Tang, Qingfu Zhang
